title: PubsubDestination
description: The Pub/Sub output destination. The Cloud Healthcare Service Agent requires the `roles/pubsub.publisher` Cloud IAM role on the Pub/Sub topic.

pubsubTopic.description: The [Pub/Sub](https://cloud.google.com/pubsub/docs/) topic that Pub/Sub messages are published on. Supplied by the client. The `PubsubMessage` contains the following fields: * `PubsubMessage.Data` contains the resource name. * `PubsubMessage.MessageId` is the ID of this notification. It is guaranteed to be unique within the topic. * `PubsubMessage.PublishTime` is the time when the message was published. [Topic names](https://cloud.google.com/pubsub/docs/overview#names) must be scoped to a project. The Cloud Healthcare API service account, service-PROJECT_NUMBER@gcp-sa-healthcare.iam.gserviceaccount.com, must have publisher permissions on the given Pub/Sub topic. Not having adequate permissions causes the calls that send notifications to fail.
